case_title: LAURENCE VINOCUR VS. CELEBRATION CREATIONS, INC. et al
cause_of_action: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS (COMPLAINT FOR CIVIL PENALTIES AND INJUNCTIVE RELIEF)

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR DEC-16-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE NOV-26-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF BRIAN JOHNSON IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VINOCUR, LAURENCE

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO WALGREEN CO IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE INJUNCTIVE RELIEF REQUIRED BY THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH PROP 65, THE ATTY'S FEES AND COSTS PROVIDED BY THE SETTLEMENT ARE REASONABLE UNDER CA LAW AND THE AMOUNT PAID IN CIVIL PENALTIES IS REASONABLE BASED ON THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN THE HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 11185, TEL. NO. (951)764-4047 (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Walgreen Co.
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRIAN C. JOHNSON OF THE CHANLER LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. (510) 848-8880 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. WALTER S. CHEN OF THE ROGERS, JOSEPH O'DONNELL LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 956-2828 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT WALGREEN COMPANY BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Walgreen Co is granted. No opposition was filed. The court finds that the injunctive relief required by the settlement complies with Prop 65, the atty's fees and costs provided by the settlement are reasonable under CA law and the amount paid in civil penalties is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in the Health and Safety Code. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185, Tel. No. (951)764-4047 =302/mjm

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
